name: Scalar — Web Form Lead Capture + AI Response

parameters.responseBody: ={ "success": true, "message": "Thank you! We will be in touch shortly." }

body.jsonOutput: ={{ JSON.stringify({ locationId: 'YOUR_GHL_LOCATION_ID', firstName: $json.firstName, lastName: $json.lastName, email: $json.email, phone: $json.phone ? '+852' + $json.phone.replace(/\D/g,'') : undefined, source: $json.source, tags: ['webform-lead', $json.isBusinessHours ? 'business-hours' : 'after-hours'], customFields: [{ key: 'service_interest', field_value: $json.service },{ key: 'inquiry_message', field_value: $json.message },{ key: 'preferred_time', field_value: $json.preferredTime },{ key: 'last_channel', field_value: 'Web Form' }] }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ pipelineId: 'YOUR_GHL_PIPELINE_ID', locationId: 'YOUR_GHL_LOCATION_ID', name: $('Extract Form Fields').first().json.fullName + ' — ' + $('Extract Form Fields').first().json.service, pipelineStageId: 'YOUR_STAGE_ID_NEW_LEAD', status: 'open', contactId: $json.contact?.id, monetaryValue: 0, source: $('Extract Form Fields').first().json.source }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'gpt-4o', messages: [{ role: 'system', content: 'You are writing a professional, warm email response on behalf of a Hong Kong med-aesthetics clinic. The email should: (1) thank them for their inquiry, (2) briefly acknowledge their interest in the specified service, (3) let them know a team member will be in contact within 1 business day to discuss and schedule a consultation, (4) include the clinic opening hours: Mon–Sat 9am–7pm. Keep it under 150 words. Do not quote prices. Sign off as "The Clinic Team".' },{ role: 'user', content: 'Client name: ' + $('Extract Form Fields').first().json.fullName + '
Service interest: ' + $('Extract Form Fields').first().json.service + '
Message: ' + $('Extract Form Fields').first().json.message + '
Preferred time: ' + ($('Extract Form Fields').first().json.preferredTime || 'Not specified') + '
Submitted: ' + ($('Extract Form Fields').first().json.isBusinessHours ? 'During business hours' : 'After hours') }], max_tokens: 300, temperature: 0.6 }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ type: 'Email', contactId: $('Create GHL Contact').first().json.contact?.id, locationId: 'YOUR_GHL_LOCATION_ID', subject: $json.emailSubject, html: '

' + $json.emailBody.replace(/\n/g, '

') + '

' }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ messageText: 'Hi ' + $json.firstName + '! 👋 Thank you for reaching out about ' + $json.service + '. We have received your enquiry and a team member will be in touch within 1 business day to schedule your consultation.\n\nClinic hours: Mon–Sat, 9am–7pm.' }) }}

parameters._notes: Replace YOUR_WATI_TENANT_ID. Phone must be digits only with country code — no + prefix. HK numbers: 852XXXXXXXX. If client is already in a WATI conversation, this sends as a session message (free). If >24h since last message, use sendTemplateMessage instead.

body.jsonOutput: ={{ JSON.stringify({ title: 'Follow up: ' + $json.service + ' enquiry', body: 'Web form lead. Message: ' + $json.message, status: 'incompleted', dueDate: new Date(Date.now() + 24*60*60*1000).toISOString(), assignedTo: 'YOUR_GHL_USER_ID' }) }}

_meta.notes: SETUP REQUIRED: (1) Replace YOUR_GHL_LOCATION_ID, YOUR_GHL_PIPELINE_ID, YOUR_STAGE_ID_NEW_LEAD, YOUR_GHL_USER_ID. (2) Embed webhook URL in your web form action attribute or Typeform/Tally webhook settings. (3) Ensure GHL email sending is configured under Settings > Email Services. (4) Phone normalization assumes HK numbers — adjust prefix logic for other regions.
